name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi operator backend — v5.15: (1) Deals "New deal" is now a prominent bronze pill. (2) Fix expiry "track" toggle 404 "Product not found": products that exist in machine stock but not the catalog now get a minimal catalog row (name pulled from stock) on first toggle, so perishable can be stored. Builds on v5.14.
